content.query:
DROP TABLE [EDW].[FACT_INBOUND_QUEUE_LOG]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[FACT_INBOUND_QUEUE_LOG]
( 
	[InboundQueueLogID] [nvarchar](100)  NOT NULL,
	[LeadID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[InboundKillReasonID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LeadSubSourceID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[BranchID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[PromoterID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CheckOutByEmployeeID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CheckOutDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[CheckOutMethod] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[FirstName] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LastName] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Address1] [nvarchar](255)  NULL,
	[Address2] [nvarchar](255)  NULL,
	[City] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[State] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Zip] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Phone] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Email] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ProductID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[ProductDescription] [nvarchar](255)  NULL,
	[Sender] [nvarchar](255)  NULL,
	[DateReceived] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[Source] [nvarchar](255)  NULL,
	[Notes] [nvarchar](2000)  NULL,
	[AppointmentDate] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[AppointmentTime] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LP_InboundQueueLogID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_LeadID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_InboundKillReasonID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_LeadSubSourceID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_BranchID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LP_PromoterID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_CheckOutByEmployeeID] [int]  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [datetime2](7)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = HASH ( [InboundQueueLogID] ),
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
